zh.title: 琐罗亚斯德预言全集 - 古波斯先知的末世预言与世界更新 | Zoroaster Prophecies
zh.description: 琐罗亚斯德（约公元前600年），古波斯先知、琐罗亚斯德教创始人。阿维斯塔经典及巴列维文献中记载的末世预言：弗拉绍凯尔提（世界最终更新）、萨奥什扬特（救世主）、善恶宇宙之战、死者复活与熔金审判。
zh.keywords: 琐罗亚斯德,查拉图斯特拉,拜火教,祆教,阿维斯塔,弗拉绍凯尔提,萨奥什扬特,古波斯预言,末世预言,善恶二元论
zh.ogTitle: 琐罗亚斯德预言全集 | Zoroaster Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 古波斯先知琐罗亚斯德的末世预言完整收录与解读。涵盖世界更新、救世主降临、善恶之战、死者复活等核心教义。
zh.twitterDescription: 琐罗亚斯德教末世预言全集：弗拉绍凯尔提（世界更新）、三位救世主、熔金审判、死者复活。影响了犹太教、基督教和伊斯兰教。

en.title: Zoroaster Prophecies - Ancient Persian Eschatology: Frashokereti, Saoshyant & Final Renovation
en.description: Zoroaster (c. 600 BCE), ancient Persian prophet and founder of Zoroastrianism. Complete collection of eschatological prophecies from the Avesta and Pahlavi texts: Frashokereti (final renovation), Saoshyant (savior), cosmic dualism, resurrection of the dead, and the molten metal ordeal.
en.ogTitle: Zoroaster Prophecies - Ancient Persian Eschatological Visions
en.ogDescription: Complete collection of Zoroastrian eschatological prophecies from the Avesta and Pahlavi texts. Frashokereti, Saoshyant, cosmic battle, resurrection, and the final renovation of the world.
en.twitterDescription: Zoroastrian eschatological prophecies: Frashokereti (final renovation), three Saoshyants, molten metal ordeal, resurrection. Influenced Judaism, Christianity, and Islam.
